case_title: ARNETTE FORT VS. CATHEDRAL HIL ASSOCIATES, LP

docket_entries.description: QUIET TITLE - REAL PROPERTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORT, ARNETTE AS TO DEFENDANT CATHEDRAL HIL ASSOCIATES, LP SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-01-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-30-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-17-2012

MASTER SHORT CAUSE CALENDAR SET FOR MAY-13-2013 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE ON AUG-12-2013 AT 9:30 AM IN 206. THOMAS DROHAN APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. MARINA FRANCO APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. THE COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE BASED ON THE REPRESENTATION OF MISS FRANCO THAT THE CLIENT'S PARTNER WAS HOSPITALIZED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 5/13/13 IS CONTINUED TO 8/12/13 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES. NOTICE IS WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-12-2012 CONTINUED TO OCT-10-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR THE SUBMISSION OF CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENTS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, SHORT CAUSE TRIAL SET FOR FEB-11-2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON OCT-10-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REMOVED FROM MASTER SHORT CAUSE CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-12-2013. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT THE CASE SETTLED. CASE IS ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 610 ON OCT-01-2013 AT 10:30 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385. (206)
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-01-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-01-2012 CONTINUED TO SEP-12-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MASTER SHORT CAUSE CALENDAR SET FOR FEB-11-2013 CONTINUED TO MAY-13-2013 AT 9:30 AM IN 206 FOR A SETTLEMENT PROTECTED DATE PER REQUEST OF THE PARTIES AT THE TRIAL CALL HEARING. PARTIES WAIVE NOTICE. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: JIROQUE; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
CASE DISMISSED BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OCT-01-2013 AT 10:30 AM PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CATHEDRAL HIL ASSOCIATES, LP
